description:
Defer loading of rich text editors, chart libraries, date pickers, and syntax highlighters until scrolled into view or focused. Show skeleton placeholders during load.

**Rationale:** Heavy libs inflate main bundle. Deferred loading prioritizes interactive elements and saves bandwidth during initial render.
title: Lazy load heavy third-party components
